input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install PowerShell modules
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Install-Module -Name Pester -Force -Scope CurrentUser -MinimumVersion 5.0
          Import-Module Pester

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = '.'
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config

  bump:
    name: Bump Version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Create VERSION file if missing
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          if (-not (Test-Path './VERSION')) {
            Set-Content -Path './VERSION' -Value '0.0.0' -NoNewline
          }

      - name: Run version bump
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./bump-version.ps1 -VersionFile './VERSION' -ChangelogFile './CHANGELOG.md'

      - name: Show results
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "VERSION file contents:"
          Get-Content ./VERSION
          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "CHANGELOG.md:"
          if (Test-Path ./CHANGELOG.md) { Get-Content ./CHANGELOG.md }

file.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install PowerShell modules
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Install-Module -Name Pester -Force -Scope CurrentUser -MinimumVersion 5.0
          Import-Module Pester

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = '.'
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config

  bump:
    name: Bump Version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Create VERSION file if missing
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          if (-not (Test-Path './VERSION')) {
            Set-Content -Path './VERSION' -Value '0.0.0' -NoNewline
          }

      - name: Run version bump
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./bump-version.ps1 -VersionFile './VERSION' -ChangelogFile './CHANGELOG.md'

      - name: Show results
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "VERSION file contents:"
          Get-Content ./VERSION
          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "CHANGELOG.md:"
          if (Test-Path ./CHANGELOG.md) { Get-Content ./CHANGELOG.md }

input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  DOTNET_NOLOGO: "true"

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install PowerShell
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v pwsh &>/dev/null; then
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common
            . /etc/os-release
            wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/${VERSION_ID}/packages-microsoft-prod.deb"
            dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            rm packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y powershell
          fi
          pwsh --version

      - name: Install Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Install-Module -Name Pester -Force -Scope CurrentUser -MinimumVersion 5.0
          Import-Module Pester

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = '.'
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config

  bump:
    name: Bump Version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install PowerShell
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v pwsh &>/dev/null; then
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common
            . /etc/os-release
            wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/${VERSION_ID}/packages-microsoft-prod.deb"
            dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            rm packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y powershell
          fi
          pwsh --version

      - name: Create VERSION file if missing
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          if (-not (Test-Path './VERSION')) {
            Set-Content -Path './VERSION' -Value '0.0.0' -NoNewline
          }

      - name: Run version bump
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./bump-version.ps1 -VersionFile './VERSION' -ChangelogFile './CHANGELOG.md'

      - name: Show results
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "VERSION file contents:"
          Get-Content ./VERSION
          Write-Host ""

- **`Get-BumpType`** — Analyzes conventional commits: `fix:` → patch, `feat:` → minor, `BREAKING CHANGE`/`feat!:` → major

- **`New-ChangelogEntry`** — Generates grouped markdown changelog
- **`Update-VersionFile`** — Writes new version back to file
- **`Invoke-VersionBump`** — Orchestrates the full pipeline
